content.claim: SNI status is established exclusively by county-level (megyei/fővárosi) expert committees under EMMI decree 15/2013, not by medical diagnosis alone. BTMN status is established by district-level (járási) committees, which cannot establish SNI. Medical diagnosis does not confer legal SNI entitlement; an educational-administrative expert committee decision is required separately.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: No data on consistency of expert-committee decision-making across counties
Governance bifurcation (healthcare identifies impairment; education confers legal status) creates accountability complexity not fully mapped in available sources
Criteria and training standards for expert committees not detailed in available research notes
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
